name: Sirloin Steak a La Backa
recipeIngredient: 1 pound round steak, trimmed of fat, cut into 4 pieces
1 large apple, peeled, cored, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the vinegar, honey, broth, and tomato paste. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over high heat.
3. Sear the steak for about 2 minutes on each side. Remove from skillet and set aside.
4. Return the steak to the skillet. Add onion, apple, and the liquid mixture.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 25-30 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Serve over cooked noodles, rice or mashed potatoes.
